rules.explanation: BrickColor is legacy. Color3 gives true 24-bit color, smaller serialization, and no palette limits. (engine tag: Deprecated)
BodyPosition is deprecated. AlignPosition runs on the physics solver natively, reducing jitter and server overhead. (engine tag: Deprecated)
BodyGyro is deprecated. AlignOrientation is constraint-based, deterministic, and easier to combine with other constraints. (engine tag: Deprecated)
BodyVelocity is deprecated. LinearVelocity integrates with the constraint solver and supports relative-to modes. (engine tag: Deprecated)
ForceField is deprecated and visually inconsistent. Use collision groups or MagnetismService for selective interaction. (engine tag: Deprecated)
MessageDialog was a blocking popup. PromptService APIs are async, non-blocking, and mobile-friendly. (engine tag: Deprecated)
Workspace.Load was synchronous and unreliable. PreloadAsync gives proper error handling and progress tracking. (engine tag: Deprecated)
Vector3Value indirection adds memory overhead and table lookups. Store Vector3 directly in attributes or tables. (engine tag: Deprecated)
